name: imprint
description: Your AI’s DNA: one skill for memory, compression, onboarding, code review, debugging, planning, progress tracking, testing, git workflow, and SEO. It learns your patterns from conversations, encodes them in structure, and carries them across platforms. Use it for any code, project, document, feature, commit, or new session.
